name: Coastal Elite Sports
address: 13295 US-331 BUS Bldg E, Freeport, FL 32439
about: Coastal Elite Sports is a premier indoor sports facility located in Freeport, FL. It offers batting cages, pickleball courts, and golf simulators in a single location. The venue operates on a pay-to-play and membership model, allowing for both casual sessions and long-term access. With an online booking system via Court Reserve, it provides a convenient and structured experience for various users.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of sports activities in one convenient location
Flexible booking options for casual and regular use

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It's recommended to bring your own clubs, though rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers activities suitable for families and children.
